{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_012sCVsKmJC2wG9QQTsu9Adv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The available GitHub MCP tools don't include any workflow run endpoints. `github_list_tools` returned all available tools, and none cover CI/Actions workflow runs (e.g., `list_workflow_runs`, `get_workflow_run`, etc.).\n\nThe tools available are limited to: issues, PRs, branches, commits, files, releases, tags, labels, users, and search — but not GitHub Actions/workflow run data.\n\nPer the CLAUDE.md constraint, I cannot fall back to `gh` CLI or `curl` to call the GitHub API directly.\n\n**Options to unblock this:**\n1. **Add a workflow runs tool** to the compressed GitHub MCP server configuration.\n2. **Relax the constraint** in CLAUDE.md to allow `gh` CLI for this specific use case — `gh run list --repo openclaw/openclaw --status failure --limit 5` would give exactly what you need.\n3. **Use the GitHub web UI** at `github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions` filtered by failed runs."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1653,"cache_read_input_tokens":33531,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1653},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c3133fdb-8fc9-4652-bd9d-8ff2737a6371","uuid":"65f1e403-a096-4ff7-96de-8e941439c7bb"}
